resumeText: Senior Frontend Engineer with 7 years of experience. Expert in React, TypeScript, Next.js, and modern CSS. Led migration from Angular to React for a SaaS platform serving 50K users. Built component library with Storybook, implemented CI/CD with GitHub Actions. Proficient in Redux, React Query, GraphQL, and Tailwind CSS. Mentored 4 junior developers. BS Computer Science.

Backend Software Engineer with 4 years Python experience. Built REST APIs with Django and FastAPI. Familiar with PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker. Some exposure to React through a side project building a personal dashboard. Deployed microservices on AWS ECS. Strong in testing with pytest. BS in Information Systems.

Marketing Manager with 8 years in digital marketing. Led campaigns across Google Ads, Facebook, and LinkedIn. Managed team of 6 content creators. Expertise in SEO, content strategy, email marketing, and analytics with Google Analytics and Tableau. MBA from state university. Increased lead generation by 150% over 2 years.

VP of Engineering with 15 years experience. Managed engineering orgs of 80+ engineers across 12 teams. Defined technical strategy, architecture review boards, and hiring processes. Earlier career: 5 years as senior software engineer writing Java and C++. Led platform migration to Kubernetes. MS Computer Science from research university.

Mid-Level Frontend Developer with 5 years experience in TypeScript and React. Built multiple production SPAs with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Implemented real-time features with WebSockets. Strong testing practice with Vitest and Playwright. Contributed to open-source component libraries. Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and Agile workflows. BS Computer Science.

Data Engineer with 6 years experience in Apache Spark, Airflow, dbt, and Snowflake. Built data warehouse processing 5TB daily at a fintech company. Strong SQL, Python, and Scala skills. AWS certified. MS in Data Engineering.
Marketing intern with 3 months experience. Created social media posts and tracked analytics. Basic Excel and Canva skills. BA in Communications.

Full stack developer with 3 years React and Node.js experience. Built several CRUD apps. Familiar with MongoDB and basic SQL. Deployed apps on Heroku. No experience with TypeScript or testing frameworks. BS in Computer Science.

Senior iOS developer with 8 years Swift experience. Built apps with 5M+ downloads. Expert in UIKit, SwiftUI, Core Data, and Combine. Led team of 4 mobile developers. Strong understanding of MVVM and clean architecture. Published 3 apps on App Store.

DevOps engineer with 5 years experience. Expert in AWS, Terraform, Docker, and Kubernetes. Built CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions. Managed production clusters handling 10K RPS. CKA certified. Strong Linux and networking skills.

Recent PhD in Computer Science specializing in reinforcement learning. Published 8 papers. Strong theoretical background but limited industry experience. Only 6-month internship at research lab. Excellent Python and PyTorch skills.

UX Designer with 10 years of experience. Led design teams at 2 FAANG companies. Expert in user research, prototyping, and design systems. Built design systems used by 500+ developers. Proficient in Figma, Sketch, and Adobe XD.

Mechanical engineer with 12 years experience in automotive industry. Expert in CAD, FEA, and manufacturing processes. Led product development for electric vehicle components. MBA from top school. No software or IT experience.

Bootcamp graduate (12 weeks). Completed projects in React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Built a social media clone and a task manager. Active on GitHub with 15 repositories. Enthusiastic learner transitioning from retail management.

Senior Product Manager with 7 years experience. Shipped 5 major product launches at scale (100M+ users). Strong data analysis skills with SQL and Python. Excellent stakeholder management. Experience in B2B SaaS and consumer products.
Backend developer with 2 years Java experience. Built REST APIs with Spring Boot. Basic understanding of databases and caching. No cloud experience. Currently pursuing AWS certification. BS in IT.

Contract frontend developer with 4 years experience across 8 companies. Worked with React, Vue, Angular, and Svelte. Broad but shallow experience. No long-term positions. Good at picking up new frameworks quickly.

Technical writer with 5 years experience documenting APIs, SDKs, and developer tools. Expert in Markdown, OpenAPI specs, and docs-as-code workflows. Strong technical background with CS degree. Can read and understand code in Python, JavaScript, and Go.

Staff engineer at FAANG with 15 years experience. Architect of company's core search infrastructure. Expert in distributed systems, C++, and Java. Led 3 major system redesigns. Published papers on information retrieval. 20+ patents filed.

Customer success manager with 4 years SaaS experience. Managed portfolio of 50+ enterprise accounts. Reduced churn by 30%. Strong relationship building and communication skills. Some basic SQL for reporting. BA in Business.
Registered Nurse with 1-2 years of experience in healthcare. Skills include Patient Care, EMR Systems, HIPAA, Clinical Documentation. Based in Remote. Strong match with extensive relevant experience.

Financial Analyst with 3-5 years of experience in finance. Skills include Financial Modeling, Excel, Bloomberg Terminal, Risk Assessment. Based in London, UK. Partial match with some transferable skills.

Curriculum Designer with 6-9 years of experience in education. Skills include Curriculum Development, LMS, Assessment Design, Pedagogy. Based in Mumbai, India. Minimal relevant experience for the target role.

Manufacturing Engineer with 10-14 years of experience in manufacturing. Skills include CAD, Six Sigma, Lean Manufacturing, Quality Control. Based in Berlin, Germany. Strong match with extensive relevant experience.

Retail Store Manager with 15+ years of experience in retail. Skills include Inventory Management, POS Systems, Customer Service, Team Leadership. Based in Tokyo, Japan. Partial match with some transferable skills.
